summary: Completed frontend testing of AyakTakip links and mockup images integration across 5 blog pages. Code analysis confirms all required elements are properly implemented with correct attributes.
passed_tests: All 5 blog pages have AyakTakip links with correct data-testid='ayaktakip-link'
All AyakTakip links have correct href='https://ayaktakip.com' and target='_blank'
First 2 blog pages (diyabet and rehber) have mockup images with data-testid='ayaktakip-mockup'
Last 3 blog pages correctly do not have mockup images
All links have proper rel='noopener noreferrer' attributes for security
Links are naturally integrated within paragraph content as requested
Mockup images have proper alt text and src attributes
